home.title: Hilads — see what's happening in your city & meet locals and travellers
home.description: See who's around and what's happening in your city today, and meet locals and travellers — live city chat, events and hangouts nearby. Real-time, no sign-up.
home.intro: Hilads is a live social layer on top of cities. Open it and instantly see who's around and what's happening today, meet locals and travellers, and jump into events and hangouts near you — no profiles, no sign-up.
home.aboutBody: Pick your city and you're in its live chat in seconds. See who's online nearby, meet locals and travellers, discover events and hangouts happening today, and start something of your own. Hilads makes every city feel alive, right now.

common.aboutHiladsBody: Hilads is a live social layer over cities worldwide. Open the app, see who's around right now, join an event in one tap, or host your own. No friends list to build first.

event.descPast: {title}{where}{when}.{attended} See upcoming events in {city} on Hilads.

venue.desc: {name}{where}. See who's around in {city} on Hilads.
venue.aboutBar: {name} is a bar in {city}. Hilads shows you who's heading there tonight and other places nearby with the same energy.
venue.aboutCafe: {name} is a coffee shop in {city}. Hilads is the easy way to find people to grab a coffee with — locals and travelers, no awkward profile-swiping.

category.title: {label} in {city}
category.descMany: {total} {label} in {city} right now. See who's going and join in one tap — real-time, no sign-up.
category.descSomeUpcoming: {city} {label} on Hilads. {count} upcoming — meet locals and travelers in one tap.
category.descSomeBrowse: {city} {label} on Hilads. Browse venues — meet locals and travelers in one tap.
category.descFew: Looking for {label} in {city}? Hilads lists what's actually on tonight. Small but real.
category.aboutBody: Hilads is the easy way to find people for {label} in {city}. Open the app, see who's heading out, join in one tap.

city.title: {timeframe} in {city} — events, meetups & locals to meet | Hilads
city.descHigh: Join real events in {city} — meetups, dinners, and rooftop hangouts with locals and travelers. Browse {count}+ events tonight & this week. No sign-up needed.
city.descMid: Join real events in {city} — meetups, dinners, and hangouts with locals and travelers. Discover upcoming events this week. No sign-up needed.
city.descLow: Discover meetups and events in {city} — connect with locals and travelers, join hangouts, or create your own. No sign-up needed to browse.
city.introEmpty: — be the first to bring the city out.
city.noEvents: No events yet — open the app to create the first one.
city.regionGeneric: Live in {country} or just visiting? Hilads brings the people out.
city.aboutBody1: Hilads is a live social layer over {city}. Open the app, see who's around right now, jump into something happening, or host your own event. No friends list to build first, no sign-up to get in.
city.aboutBody2: Whether you live in {city} or you're visiting for a few days, Hilads makes it easy to meet people the way locals do — through what's actually happening, not through profiles.

past.title: Past hangouts & pulses in {city} | Hilads
past.descItems: A look back at recent hangouts and pulses in {city} on Hilads — see what locals and travelers got up to, then find what's on next.
past.introItems: A look back at recent hangouts and pulses in {city}.
past.whatsNextBody: This is what recently happened in {city} on Hilads. See {link} and join in one tap.
